mapper.select: SELECT kb.id as knowledgeBaseId, kb.name as knowledgeBaseName, COUNT(DISTINCT cm.session_id) as interviewCount, COUNT(cm.id) as answerCount, AVG(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(cm.comment, '$.score') AS DECIMAL(10,2))) as avgScore FROM chat_message cm LEFT JOIN knowledge_base kb ON cm.knowledge_base_id = kb.id WHERE cm.role = 'user' AND cm.finish_comment = 1 GROUP BY kb.id, kb.name ORDER BY interviewCount DESC
